## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Siit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming features.](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content clusters need refinement; Jess will dig deeper and propose new article topics](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Traffic showing positive growth; new content performing well](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [AI agents beta coming end of month; plan for GA push](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Content publishing schedule needs adjustment; Jess to follow up](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)

## Topics

### Content Cluster Refinement

  - [Jess added clusters to Airtable, some topics don't align perfectly](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Industry categories already exist, can be added as subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Many topics present opportunities to dig deeper](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=127.0)
  - [Clusters provide insight into Siit's audience interests](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Plan: use clusters as jumping-off point for next round of content suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Positive traffic growth since Feb 2nd (first refresh publish date)](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [New content showing good performance](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Planned content to go live by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
  - [Too early for deep performance analysis (typically meaningful at 1-3 month mark)](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [GSC good for early directional insights; deeper metrics (engagement, etc.) come later](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)

### Upcoming Features and Content Planning

  - [AI agents beta ready end of month](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Strategic push planned for GA release, not beta](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Start planning content cluster around AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)

### Data Analysis and Tracking

  - [Carmel shared HubSpot data on article views](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

  - [Too early for detailed performance trends; will dig deeper in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

### Website Structure and Features

  - [Carmel working on structuring features pages](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

  - [Kyle offered to review Carmel's notion draft for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)

  - [Jess to follow up with publisher to adjust dates](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=874.0)
  - [Add Carmel and head of customer experience to author rotation](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=903.0)
  - [Carmel to provide author details for Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/25FYWmX7XbqNSD_EStB5Zen93W-KxMJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
